description: Provides categorization of patent citations, indicating their relevance and importance in the examination process.

columns.name: citn_id
columns.description: Sequential identifier for citations within a patent publication.

columns.name: pat_publn_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the citing patent publication.

columns.name: relevant_claim
columns.description: Specific claim number(s) to which the citation is relevant.

columns.name: citn_replenished
columns.description: Flag indicating if citation data was replenished or enhanced from additional sources.

columns.name: citn_categ
columns.description: Category code indicating the citation's relevance (e.g., X=particularly relevant, Y=relevant in combination).
